title: Apparel Shirt Isolation, Background Cleanup and Marketplace-Ready E-commerce Set
one_line_ask: Turn a messy worn-shirt hero photo plus a flat-lay reference shirt into a clean, colour-true, marketplace-ready apparel product set (cleaned studio backdrop, isolated transparent packshot, vectorized logo, square + catalog crops).

issues: Background is pale grey rather than pure white (per brief, acceptable for source asset but will need removal for final packshot)
Faint grey background gradient visible (needs cleanup for final use)
Soft shadow under shirt (intended for edge testing, not an issue)
Sleeve fold creates slight asymmetry with left sleeve crossing over body at an angle rather than lying fully flat — minor compositing challenge at cuff overlap
Very subtle luminance noise visible in shadow areas under collar — within acceptable source-file tolerance
Background gradient is present (slightly warmer/darker at bottom-left corner) — expected and flagged for designer removal
Collar points show minor soft-edge rendering that may require manual masking refinement
Fabric creases are natural and convincing but the chest area is slightly smoother than a true garment photograph would show — borderline but acceptable
Background is not fully transparent (checkerboard pattern visible, but this is a common placeholder for transparency in previews and may not be present in the source file)
Slight softness on leaf glyph edges may require minor cleanup before vectorizing
Stem detail on leaf is very fine and could drop out at small sizes
Very slight residual tilt present but within the ≤5° acceptable tolerance
Exposure is marginally flat/dark as intended — no unintended clipping
Mixed warm/cool lighting visible — intentional per brief
Olive-green shirt reads slightly muddy/desaturated — intentional for colour-correction step
Background clutter (coat rack, cables, laundry basket, half-open closet) fully present and suitably distracting — intentional
No severe AI artefacts detected: finger count normal, hair flyaways natural, fabric wrinkles authentic, skin pores visible
Subject is sharp, centred, and clearly the dominant focal point
No real-world brands, logos, or trademarks visible
